source_basis: Fixture methodology audit; no full text, data, or live lookup reviewed.
what_i_can_verify: The artifact follows the shared book artifact schema.
what_remains_uncertain: Real source-use verdicts require source text, method details, and claim context.
user_verification_needed: Provide the actual source material and target claim before relying on the audit.

tool_use_summary: No external lookup, source text, dataset, or method appendix was checked.
gate_status: Not ready for source-use reliance until method evidence is visible.
human_checkpoints: Human reviewer must verify source identity, method access, and source-claim fit.
process_passport.handoff_notes: Use this fixture only to validate methodology-source audit structure and handoff limits.

source_audit_rows.method_evidence: Abstract only; method and data unavailable.
source_audit_rows.cannot_support: Robust causal, generalizable, or method-quality claims.
source_audit_rows.use_recommendation: Request full method details before relying on the source.
